title: grindelia robusta var. patens
intro: Grindelia robusta var. patens, also known as broad-leaved gum plant or gum plant, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The plant's medicinal properties are due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. Grindelia robusta var. patens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in topical applications, such as salves and creams, to aid in wound healing and skin irritations.
